name: Chorizo & Rice Wrapped in Cabbage Leaves
recipeInstructions:
In a saucepan, combine rice, water and salt. Bring to boil, cover and simmer for 30 minutes. Turn off heat and let sit for 10 minutes. Uncover and cool slightly.
Cut chorizo and cucumber into long, 1/4-inch wide by 6-inch long matchsticks. Cut green onions into 6-inch lengths.
Bring a large pot of water to boil; add cabbage leaves. Cook for 30 seconds or until leaves are softened. Drain in cold water; pat dry with paper towels. Trim each cabbage leaf to a 5X6-inch rectangle.
Spoon about 1/4 cup rice along the 6-inch length of each cabbage leaf, not far from the edge. Arrange 4 rows of chorizo sticks (using extra pieces if necessary), 2 green onion pieces and 1 cucumber stick over rice, and gently press into rice. Roll up cabbage leaf tightly, brushing ends with oil to seal. Gently squeeze roll so that filling holds together.
Cut each roll into 1-inch pieces. Arrange cut-side down on serving dish. In a small bowl, combine oil, parsley, garlic, hot pepper sauce and salt to taste. Spoon over chorizo rolls and serve at room temperature.
